_meta.notes: Farming trainer. Found in forsaken-village (the few residual fields that still produce). Teaches farming, weaving, and pottery in a single bundle.

tagline: stooped, kind-eyed, smells of warm earth and pine smoke.

behavior.default: kneels in the dirt, fingers everything, talks to the seedlings
narrativeHooks: Orin remembers the year the village died. He keeps planting anyway.
He calls every plant 'love.' Including the weeds. Especially the weeds.

teachingLines: The soil tells you what it wants if you stop talking long enough.
Patience is the only seed that grows in any season.
